architecture_decisions.decision: Make organization_id nullable in print_policies table
architecture_decisions.rationale: Tests fail because schema requires organization_id but test fixtures create policies without organization association. Global/system-level policies should not require organization binding.

architecture_decisions.decision: Use JSON marshaling for type-agnostic slice comparison in rule operators
architecture_decisions.rationale: Go type assertions fail when comparing []interface{} with []string or []float64. JSON serialization provides reliable equality checking across different slice types.

architecture_decisions.decision: Create dedicated test fixture helpers with valid UUIDs
architecture_decisions.rationale: Tests fail with 'invalid UUID' errors. Centralized fixture generation ensures consistent valid test data.

architecture_decisions.decision: Add DocumentType to evaluation context in policy engine
architecture_decisions.rationale: Test expects DocumentType in evalCtx but policy engine only includes User, Printer, and Job. Content-based filtering requires document type awareness.

backend_tasks.purpose: Make organization_id column nullable to allow global/system policies
key_functions: ALTER TABLE print_policies ALTER COLUMN organization_id DROP NOT NULL

backend_tasks.purpose: Rollback migration for organization_id nullable change
key_functions: ALTER TABLE print_policies ALTER COLUMN organization_id SET NOT NULL

backend_tasks.purpose: Fix In and Between operator type assertion issues using JSON comparison
Add DocumentType to evaluation context for content-based rules
Fix TestEngineAppliesToScope to include DocumentType in evalCtx
Fix TestRepositoryUpdate with valid UUID for ModifiedBy field
Add DocumentType field to EvaluationContext struct
Add ValidUUID and ValidPolicyID helpers for test fixtures

cases: TestListPoliciesHandler_Empty - verifies empty array JSON response
TestListPoliciesHandler_WithResults - verifies policy array with valid UUIDs

e2e_tests.name: Create and apply global policy without organization
steps: Evaluate policy for user from any organization

e2e_tests.name: Content-based filtering with DocumentType
steps: Create policy with rule: DocumentType In [PDF, DOCX]
Assert different outcomes based on content type

security_notes: NULL organization_id policies apply globally - ensure only admin users can create
Validate UUID format at API boundary before database insert
DocumentType should be sanitized to prevent injection attacks
Rate limit policy evaluation to prevent DoS via complex rules
docker_changes: No Docker changes required - this is a bug fix within existing service
market_driven_features: Content-based filtering (DocumentType) addresses DLP requirements from FR-M009
Global policy support enables enterprise-wide policy templates (FR-M012)
Organization scoping foundation for multi-tenant cost allocation (FR-M011)
